text:

From-To: open->feedback

Execution fails on my machine, could you look into this please? 

[corn:~]> jstrack Error in startup script: can't find package autoscroll 
while executing 
"package require autoscroll" 
(file "jstlib.tcl" line 38) invoked from within 
"source jstlib.tcl" 
(file "/usr/local/lib/jstrack/tracker/jstrack.tcl" line 5) invoked 
from within 
"source [file join [file dirname $myName] 
/usr/local/lib/jstrack/tracker/jstrack.tcl]" 
(file "/usr/local/bin/jstrack" line 11)
